description: John Zenon, a process technician, is due for his annual occupational health surveillance examination due to chronic exposure to organic solvents (toluene/xylene). As the Occupational Health Technician, complete his surveillance cycle in GNU Health by documenting the occupational chemical exposure (ICD-10 Z57.x), recording a surveillance clinical evaluation with vitals (systolic BP, diastolic BP, and heart rate), ordering a biological monitoring lab panel with at least three laboratory orders (such as CBC, hepatic, and renal function), documenting a new patient lifestyle record reflecting his current risk factors, and scheduling his next annual surveillance appointment for 335-395 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
